rulings.Case Title: TERILYN JOE et al VS. 1520 TAYLOR STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order Resolving Settlement Dispute
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday January 13, 2015 line 1 . DEFENDANT 1520 TAYLOR STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION Motion For Order Resolving Settlement Dispute CONTINUED to January 21, 2015. Parties are to submit to the Court no later than 4:00 p.m. on January 14, 2015 a joint draft of the Comprehensive Settlement Agreement. Parties must indicate which sections of the Comprehensive Settlement Agreement are acceptable to both parties; and which sections are disputed, with both parties providing proposed language for specific disputed sections, without argument. Parties are to use December 10, 2014 proposed Comprehensive Settlement Agreement (Exhibit C to Letulle Declaration in Support of Opposition to Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement) as a starting point =(501/req)

rulings.Case Title: TERILYN JOE et al VS. 1520 TAYLOR STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday January 13, 2015 line 1. PLAINTIFF TERILYN JOE, LINDA LUOMA Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment CONTINUED to January 21, 2015. Parties are to submit to the Court no later than 4:00 p.m. on January 14, 2015 a joint draft of the Comprehensive Settlement Agreement. Parties must indicate which sections of the Comprehensive Settlement Agreement are acceptable to both parties; and which sections are disputed, with both parties providing proposed language for specific disputed sections, without argument. Parties are to use December 10, 2014 proposed Comprehensive Settlement Agreement (Exhibit C to Letulle Declaration in Support of Opposition to Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement) as a starting point. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GABRIELA GEYER et al VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday January 13, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED to February 18, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than January 30, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. No exhibits attached to the courtesy copy of Request for Judicial Notice, =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTINA M. IBARRA et al VS. 39-41 LAKE STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday January 13, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANT 39-41 LAKE STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT TRANSFERRED to Department 302 to be heard on January 15, 2015 at 9:30 a.m.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. MARK ANTHONY MENDAROS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday January 13, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANT MARK MENDAROS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. CCP 1161c applies to "termination of tenancy," moving defendant is alleged to be the trustor under the foreclosed upon Deed of Trust. Defendant and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHANSELL PROPERTIES INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. MARY ADAMS ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday January 13, 2015 line 5. PLAINTIFF CHANSELL PROPERTIES INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION Notice Of Motion And Motion To Add New Plaintiff Curret Owner Of The Premises And Remove Predecessor In Interest GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIPAK GANDHI VS. KEVIN MARQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday January 13, 2015 line 6. DEFENDANT KEVIN MARQUEZ Motion In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; GRANTED. Hearing required to address duplicative action (650634) filed after the instant action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TOY REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT COMPANY I, LLC VS. NANCY MATTINGLY ET AL

rulings.Case Title: GARY W PASQUINELLI AND JUDITH HONIG PASQUINELLI VS. GEOFFREY KARREN
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday January 13, 2015 line 9. DEFENDANT GEOFFREY KARREN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer based on breach of lease. First Amended Complaint is not uncertain. =(501/REQ)
